caveats: severity_heuristic is a deterministic regex heuristic, NOT a validated clinical label -- see docs/01_clinical_taxonomy.md Section 4-5.
Hinglish variants are deterministic phonetic perturbations of a small illustrative prefix bank, NOT the full synthetic generation pipeline -- see build_dataset.py module docstring.
routing_confidence='low' rows (GEN_MED catch-all from document-type-artifact specialties) should be filtered or down-weighted by downstream consumers needing high-confidence specialty labels.
